label: Alpha Vantage
comment: Free tier: 25 requests/day. US stocks, no intraday data.

label: Finnhub
comment: Free tier: 60 calls/min. US stocks and some international markets.

label: Polygon.io
comment: Free tier: 15-min delayed data. Paid plans for real-time US stocks.

label: Twelve Data
comment: Free tier: 800 requests/day, 8/min. Global stocks and ETFs.

label: Yahoo Finance
comment: Unofficial v8 API — no key required. May be rate-limited or break without warning.

label: Fin. Modeling Prep
comment: Free tier: 250 requests/day, 5/min. US stocks and ETFs.

label: Yahoo Finance (page)
comment: Page scraper — no key required. Returns current price only, no history.
